case succ
L : Logic ℕ
χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
φ : Formula ℕ
hφ : φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction_omega L χ ξ T hT
i : ℕ
ih :
  φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i →
    χ ➝ φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T ∨
      ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)),
        ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ) →
          Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
hi :
  φ ∈
    @LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction.match_1 (fun x => Set (Formula ℕ)) (decode i)
      (fun δ =>
        if
            ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)),
              ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i →
                Γ.conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T then
          insert δ (LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i)
        else LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i)
      fun _ => LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT i
⊢ χ ➝ φ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T ∨
    ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)),
      ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ) →
        Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T

cases decode i with
    | none => exact ih hi
    | some δ =>
      simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hi
      cases hi with
      | inl hδ =>
        have : encode φ = i := by
          apply encode_decode
          exact hδ
        subst this
        right
        intro Γ hΓ
        have : ∀ Γ : Finset (Formula _), ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i → Γ.conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
          simp_all
        exact this Γ (by simpa using hΓ)
      | inr hδ =>
        exact ih hδ

cases decode i with
    | none => exact ih hi
    | some δ =>
      simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, if_pos, if_neg] at hi
      cases hi with
      | inl rfl =>
        right
        intro Γ hΓ
        have hΓ' : ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i := by
          apply Set.Subset.trans hΓ
          apply monotone_construction (Nat.le_succ _)
        have hcond : ∀ Γ : Finset _, ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i → Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
          simp_all
        exact hcond Γ hΓ'
      | inr hφ' => exact ih hφ'

cases decode i with

    | some δ =>
      simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, Set.mem_setOf_eq] at hi
      cases hi with

cases decode i with
    | none => exact ih hi
    | some δ =>
      simp only [Set.mem_insert_iff, if_pos, if_neg] at hi
      cases hi with
      | inl hδ =>
        have h_encode : encode φ ≤ i + 1 := by
          apply Nat.le_succ_of_le
          apply Nat.encode_decode
        have h_subset : construction T hT (encode φ) ⊆ construction T hT (i + 1) :=
          monotone_construction h_encode
        right
        intro Γ hΓ
        have hΓ' : ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT (i + 1) := Set.Subset.trans hΓ h_subset
        simp_all
      | inr hδ =>
        exact ih hδ
